Player 1: As a Servant, I need to support the Good team. Since I proposed the team [0, 2] and there's no evidence of their roles being evil yet, approving helps progress the quest. Rejecting would delay the mission without clear benefit.
Player 0: As a Minion, I must support my evil teammate (Player 2) and ensure the quest fails. Approving the team [0, 2] gives us control over the quest, allowing us to sabotage it. Rejecting would risk a stronger good-aligned team forming.
